title: Tk Lohman
compiled_truth: Tk Lohman is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-25), Tk Lohman sent 134 and received 1619 emails, totalling 1753 interactions.
